commands: sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && pwd && git status --short && ls -l .env compose.yaml && grep -E "^(RESULTS_API_PARTIES_URL|GOVERNOR_RESULTS_PREFIX|STATIC_RESULTS_PREFIX|RESULTS_API_STATIC_RESULTS_PREFIX)=" .env || true && docker compose --env-file .env config --quiet'
